headline: ConocoPhillips Earnings Slip as Output Falls
summary: ConocoPhillips reported a year-on-year decline in first-quarter earnings and production, while flagging geopolitical uncertainty in Qatar as a key risk to near-term output guidance.

headline: Is It Worth Investing in ConocoPhillips (COP) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in ConocoPhillips (COP). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Chevron, Exxon Earnings Show Resilience, But Oil Stocks Retreat
summary: Chevron and Exxon Mobil reported weak Q1 earnings early Friday as the Iran war disrupted oil shipments.  Despite the disruptions, both oil major beat earnings estimates as production volumes rose, and underscored their resilience to geopolitical conflicts.  Exxon highlighted record production in Guyana and the first LNG production at Golden Pass Train 1, a joint venture with QatarEnergy.

content.title: Chevron, Exxon Earnings Show Resilience, But Oil Stocks Retreat
content.summary: Chevron and Exxon Mobil reported weak Q1 earnings early Friday as the Iran war disrupted oil shipments.  Despite the disruptions, both oil major beat earnings estimates as production volumes rose, and underscored their resilience to geopolitical conflicts.  Exxon highlighted record production in Guyana and the first LNG production at Golden Pass Train 1, a joint venture with QatarEnergy.
